facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 192 reviews. On the main strip in Phu Quoc.

ZEN Spa & Nail (2) on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo keeps showing up in every locals-and-tourists shortlist for a reason. Nails, massage, relaxation. All rated near-perfect by nearly 200 people who actually went.

Book it before your beach day or after. Either way, your feet will thank you.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
